introSection: Crazy Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Loca Joy Holiday Theme Park in Yongchuan, Chongqing, China. It is one of the first 10-Inversion roller coasters built by Intamin to feature a redesigned track layout, lap bar-only trains, and a cable lift hill.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are held in by lap-bar restraints.

fullText:
Crazy Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Loca Joy Holiday Theme Park in Yongchuan, Chongqing, China. It is one of the first 10-Inversion roller coasters built by Intamin to feature a redesigned track layout, lap bar-only trains, and a cable lift hill.



Riders are held in by lap-bar restraints.
